## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to align on content strategy for SEO and product authority building.](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Focus Shift**: Moving from broad industry-specific content to deep authoritative content on key concepts like "call flow design" to establish Smith.ai as an authority for both Google and LLM searches](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [**Template Pages Status**: Template pages are ready with PDF hosting functionality; missing H1 tag needs fixing; heading styles need adjustment](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [**Product vs. SEO Content**: Smith.ai needs clear separation between product marketing content (use cases, product capabilities) and educational SEO content to avoid confusing search engines](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Terminology Update**: Considering changing "clients" to "customers" in non-legal industry content to better match search intent and improve rankings](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

## Topics

### Template Pages Update

  - [Pages are set up and ready with automatic PDF hosting functionality](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Need to fix missing H1 tags (Elvis will coordinate with Vole)](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Maddy noted headings look too large and requested visual adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - ["Free" should be displayed as a badge rather than in the page title](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Elvis creating a master prompt for generating text content under templates](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Will send page structure for review (includes H2s like "5 benefits of using X report")](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)

### Content Strategy Realignment

  - [Maddy clarified Smith.ai needs deep, authoritative content on core concepts rather than broad industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Focus on creating "master class level" content (5,000+ words) for key terms like "call flow design"](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Content should be encyclopedic and position Smith.ai as an authority on AI voice technology](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Agreed to start with "call flow design" as the first pillar content piece](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Content should include network mapping of related terms/concepts that connect to the main topic](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Need to maintain clear separation between educational SEO content and product marketing use cases](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Hub and Spoke Content Structure

  - [Agreed on creating hub pages with definitions at the top, followed by in-depth guides with visuals](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Hub pages will link to related articles and other related term pages](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Will start with one hub (call flow design) to get approval before expanding](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Maddy suggested "call quality control" as a potential second hub topic](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Content should describe components before branching to applications (similar to teaching cooking basics before recipes)](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

### Keyword/Term Usage Strategy

  - [Considering testing the impact of changing "clients" to "customers" in non-legal industry content](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Elvis will identify \~20 moderate-ranking blog posts for testing the term change](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [Will track performance through search console to measure impact](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Future workflows will differentiate between industry types for appropriate terminology](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to send template page structure for review by Maddy](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Start building a comprehensive "call flow design" pillar content piece as the first hub](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Elvis to create a refined list of topics that won't compete with Smith.ai's product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Implement and test changing "clients" to "customers" in select blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [Continue template work and fix the "Free" badge styling issue](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Elvis will research call flow design components and create a network map of related concepts](https://fathom.video/share/qxUoxzjDmfdPzC4ERCoskWnxURkyu6Yr?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
